learning_outcomes.title: Objectives
learning_outcomes.description: In this course, you will acquire fundamental Python programming skills that will enable you to enter the world of software development.

bullet_points.syntax: Understanding of syntax, data structures, and basic algorithms.
bullet_points.writing: Ability to write simple Python programs.
bullet_points.applications: Understanding of practical Python applications by the end of the course.

feedback.title: Feedback from Customers & Partners
feedback.subtitle: Experience software, consulting, and coaching with a focus on principles, ethics, and excellence for optimal results.

testimonials.name: Oleg Murzin
testimonials.text: I participated in a three-day seminar on 'React' at Kodschul, and it was great! The trainer had impressive knowledge and experience, which he generously shared with all participants. He explained every question skillfully and clearly, supported by illustrative examples. Would do it again anytime!

testimonials.name: Sarah Weber
testimonials.text: The TypeScript training was excellently structured and practical. I particularly liked the combination of theory and practical exercises. The trainer was able to explain complex concepts very understandably.

testimonials.name: Michael Schmidt
testimonials.text: An excellent Docker seminar! The content was current and relevant, and the practical examples helped me implement what I learned directly in my daily work.

testimonials.name: Julia Bauer
testimonials.text: The Angular training was exactly what our team needed. The trainer took time for individual questions and was able to give very valuable tips from his years of experience.

Investments in AI and IT training increase productivity by 66%
By 2030, AI will influence almost all jobs - act now!

top_section.title: Don't see the course you're looking for?

step1.title: Contact us
points: Simply give us a quick call or leave an email
Our team will take care of you immediately
